subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter dated 11 Jamádiyu'l-Avval 1327, together with the missive from the Spiritual Assembly of Shiraz, was received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه مورخ به ۱۱ جمادی الاول ۱۳۲۷ رسید با نامه محفل روحانی شیراز
subcodes.subjects: @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @law of inheritance, @rights of the eldest son; primogeniture
